title: notifications core — trait composition per model
description: Notifications core owns zero new traits — it consumes foundation's cross-cutting traits + tenants's boundary traits. This file documents (a) the framework + foundation + tenants traits every core model composes, and (b) the canonical compose-order per model so CI's trait-order linter can verify. Push subscriptions live in `notifications-push` (not this module); mail suppression in `notifications-mail`; SMS opt-outs in `notifications-sms`.

framework.reason: ULID primary keys — time-ordered, URL-safe, tenant-neutral.
Retention windows enforced by soft-delete + scheduled hard-purge job (see retention.json).

foundation.reason: NotificationTemplate + NotificationCategory carry is_system=true for platform defaults; Policy@update refuses on system rows unless the actor is super_admin.
created_by / updated_by / deleted_by auto-populated from auth actor.
Preference / template / delivery changes audit-logged; audit rows classify as audit_log tier.
Universal metadata JSONB — channel modules emit metadata fields the core schema doesn't need to model.
NotificationTemplate ordered by (key, locale, channel, version DESC).
Every model exposes filterable() for spatie/laravel-query-builder integration.
Notification indexed for admin diagnostics; template indexed for admin template browsing.
NotificationTemplate + NotificationPreference importable via CSV/JSON for tenant onboarding + backup restore.
Notification exportable for DSAR (Art. 15); NotificationPreference exportable for user-driven backup.

tenants.reason: Every model except NotificationCategory carries tenant_id; auto-scope on read queries.
Notification carries application_id (a coach's inbox is per-app).
NotificationTemplate + NotificationCategory: tenant_id NULLABLE. NULL = platform default; row with tenant_id set = tenant override.

notification.notes: Root of the notifications record. State machine on delivery status. Auditable for consent + delivery evidence. NOT Importable (notifications are emitted by the system, not imported).

notification_delivery.notes: Per-channel attempt. Belongs to a Notification (which carries tenant+application). Not Searchable (aggregate metrics preferred over full-text).

notification_template.notes: Full monty. is_system distinguishes platform defaults from tenant overrides. Sortable by (key, locale, channel, version DESC). Importable / Exportable for tenant onboarding backup + change management (SOC 2 CC8.1 evidence). Body cached as pre-rendered HTML with Blade placeholders — rendering happens at CI build time via the emails renderer package, not runtime.

notification_preference.notes: User opt-in per (category, channel). NOT SoftDeletes — preferences are hard-deleted on user erasure per GDPR Art. 17. Importable / Exportable for tenant-driven preference backup + user-driven preference export.

notification_digest.notes: Batching state. Not Auditable (transient — 30d retention). Not SoftDeletes (30d hard-purge). State machine: pending / delivered / skipped / failed.

notification_category.notes: Registry seeded from every module's notifications.json. Sluggable with module-namespaced slugs; is_system=true on platform-owned categories. tenant_id NULL for platform categories; tenants can override display_name + default_channels via same-slug row with their tenant_id.

traitOrderContract.rule: Every model in every module composes traits in this canonical order (foundation traits.json enforces + CI lints).
order: framework/lifecycle-tail (SoftDeletes — must be last so its booted() runs after every observer)
